name: chart-area-default
visual_summary: The chart-area-default component is a standard area chart for visualizing data. It can be used to display trends or values over time and is often used in dashboards, reports, or analytics pages.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-area-default
Description: The chart-area-default component is a standard area chart for visualizing data. It can be used to display trends or values over time and is often used in dashboards, reports, or analytics pages.
Style: modern, flat, compact
Interactions: hover highlights, clickable data points
Tags: chart, area chart, bar chart, dashboard, report, analytics

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
